content.en:
The highest status among the Protoss is undoubtedly the First Divine Lord of the Protoss, as long as the First Divine Lord of the Protoss agrees to let him enter the Chaos Ancient Well, then he can enter the Chaos Ancient Well.

As for how to convince the First Divine Lord of the Protoss, it was definitely not easy.

"The first god lord is a second-class supreme realm, and even among the second-class supremes, it is not too powerful, but even so, there are not many conditions that can make him excited, and the bargaining chip that I can really make the first god lord of the god race agree to the conditions is my potential!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He knew very well that even the First Divine Lord was extremely worried, because his strength was too weak to compare with those Supremes of the Twelve Universe Eras.

If the First Divine Lord was given a long time, Ye Tian believed that he could ascend to the first-class supreme realm, but now he didn't have so much time to improve his strength.

"One condition, the condition for helping the Divine Lord to make a move in the future, this condition is enough for the First Divine Lord of the Protoss to be moved! Besides, just cultivating once with the help of the Chaos Ancient Well is not too harsh requirements, and the First Divine Lord of the Protoss should agree!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately.

In the name of the Lord of Ten Thousand Laws, he sent a letter of visit to the Protoss, asking to meet with the First Divine Lord of the Protoss.

As for whether the first god can see or not, that is an afterthought.

If the First Divine Lord does not see him, he will find another way to see the First Divine Master.

......

The Protoss, the palace of the First Divine Lord.

One of the masters handed over Ye Tian's letter and handed it to the First Divine Master.

"A letter from the Lord of the Terran Ten Thousand Laws?"

The First Divine Lord was a little surprised, and he didn't know why the Lord of the Ten Thousand Laws of the Human Race had sent a letter.

He naturally knew about this genius of the human race, but the other party was still too weak, so he didn't pay much attention.

If it was before, he still wanted to assassinate this genius, but now that the supremes of the Twelve Universe Epochs have appeared, coupled with the appearance of too many Sons of the Universe, and the transcendence of the Twin Universes, he has no heart to deal with Ye Tian at all.

In his opinion, Ye Tian would not have much impact under such circumstances, and besides, the Wan Clan was still in the unified camp, so he was naturally even more difficult to start.

The First Divine Lord opened the letter, and suddenly a powerful aura turned into Ye Tian's phantom.

"Terran Ye Tian greets the First Divine Master!"

Ye Tiandao.

At this moment, the expression of the First Divine Lord changed, and he felt a power comparable to the Supreme from this illusory shadow, although it was only a very weak power, but it proved that the master who created this illusory shadow was definitely a supreme-level combat power!

But the realm of this phantom master is definitely the realm of domination!

"A master, comparable to the supreme combat power, this is the strength of the first genius of the universe, underestimate him!"

The First Divine Lord was surprised.

"To see, or not to see?"

The First Divine Lord hesitated.

If Ye Tian was too weak, he would undoubtedly lose face if he went to see Ye Tian with the first god master.

But now, Ye Tian has shown a strength comparable to that of the Supreme, and with the identity of the first genius of the universe, he can go and meet Ye Tian.

In the letter, Ye Tian asked to meet at the edge of the Protoss territory to discuss an important matter.

"Hmph, coward!"

The First Divine Lord of the Protoss said coldly.

However, he still didn't ask Ye Tian to enter his palace, if he really mentioned it, Ye Tian would probably leave directly.

Swish!

The First Divine Lord left the palace, and in an instant, he crossed the star fields and came to the place agreed with Ye Tian.

He didn't bring a supreme, because he was the strongest supreme of the god race, and there was no need to bring other supremes to see a master.

Soon, Ye Tian met with the First Divine Master.

--------

"You're the only one, didn't the supreme of your human race come?"

The First Divine Lord asked.

Ye Tian said with a smile: "In front of the First Divine Lord of the Protoss, even if the Supreme of our Human Race comes, he is still not the opponent of the First Divine Lord!"

The First Divine Lord felt that what Ye Tian said was very reasonable, if he really made a move, the supreme of the human race would definitely not be able to protect Ye Tian.

"Lord of Ten Thousand Laws, why did you come to see me?"

The First Divine Lord asked.

"There is only one thing, I want to enter the largest chaotic ancient well controlled by your human race to cultivate for a period of time, it shouldn't be a long time!" Ye Tian said truthfully.

"Are you kidding?"

The First Divine Master's smile froze, and his voice became cold.

"First Divine Master, I'm not joking, but I'm talking about this matter very seriously!" Ye Tian said again: "If the First Divine Lord agrees, I am willing to take action for the Protoss once in the future to protect the safety of the Protoss." If the two universes collide together in the future, the Protoss, as the race with the most powerful luck in the universe, will definitely be the target of everyone, and with the strength of the First Divine Master, I am afraid that it will not be able to protect the Protoss!"

"Joke, I can't protect the Protoss, do you think you can?

The First Divine Lord was furious.

He has been in the universe for a long time, and even the First Demon Lord is not his opponent, so he can only fight him.

And now, Ye Tian, who has not been cultivating for a long time, and the junior who only dominates the ultimate cultivation dares to talk to him like this.

"Look for death!"

The First Divine Lord made a move, and as soon as he made a move, it was a divine power attack comparable to that of a fourth-class supreme, if Ye Tian couldn't even block such an attack, he would die if he died!

"Hunyuan Slash!"

Ye Tian also made a move, and cast the Hunyuan Slash.

Now the attack of the Hunyuan Slash is enough to reach the level of the third-rank supreme being more powerful, so it is easy to break through this casual divine power attack of the first god lord.

Rumble!!!

The sword that Hunyuan slashed turned into tore through the divine power attack of the First Divine Lord, and slashed directly at his body.

Rumble!!!

The First Divine Lord punched Ye Tian's Hunyuan Slash, and there was a lot of surprise on his face, "I didn't expect you to be able to use the Master Cultivator to make a move that is comparable to the all-out one-hit move of the Third-Order Supreme." It's a genius indeed, but it's a pity that it's not enough to talk to me like that!"

The First Divine Lord struck again, and this time he directly reached the extreme of the Third Order Supreme.

Rumble!!!!

The Endless Void seemed to have collapsed, and time and space were frozen.

"Unstoppable!"

Ye Tian judged.

Since he can't stop it, he naturally won't be stupid to block it.

"Constant Light Magical Power!"

Ye Tian turned into a constant light and pierced through this void, and escaped in an instant, and the speed was so fast that the First Divine Lord, the second-rank supreme, could not stop it.

Because, Ye Tian's speed is too fast, far beyond his imagination!

Distance.

Ye Tian's figure appeared, looking at the First Divine Lord, and said, "First Divine Lord, my current strength is not as good as yours, but my speed even surpasses the average first-class supreme, and you can't help me at all, just a second-class supreme." In other words, you can't kill me. And I'm about to step into the realm of Heavenly Venerable, when the time comes, my strength may be directly comparable to you, and soon surpass you, and the first-class supreme is definitely not far from me. "

"I don't believe you're that fast!"

The First Divine Lord pursued him.

But in fact, his speed was indeed far inferior to Ye Tian, no matter how he accelerated his speed, he couldn't even touch Ye Tian's shadow, this was still Ye Tian's speed could be reduced, otherwise he would have disappeared long ago.

After a long time, the First Divine Lord gradually accepted this fact.

"Ye Tian, I agreed to your conditions!"

The First Divine Lord took a deep breath and said helplessly.
